conflict: Nick's need to map the data pipeline for sabotage puts him in intimate proximity with Bao, whose humanity complicates everything
consequence: Relational — Nick's bond with Bao becomes a genuine complication, not an abstract one
must_land_beats: The nightshift ecosystem — its own subculture of people with complicated reasons for being there
Bao and Nick bonding over color theory and shared visual language
Bao's wife Mai and her early-onset dementia — told matter-of-factly, not sentimentally
Nick riding BART home at 2 AM, unsettled by his own reflection
pressure_source: Nick's need to map the data pipeline for sabotage puts him in intimate proximity with Bao, whose humanity complicates everything
secondary_character_beats: Bao must carry his own weight here — his devotion to Mai, his meticulous evaluation style, his quiet wry humor should register as a life, not a backstory info-dump

setups_to_plant.description: Bao's deliberate evaluation pace earns performance warnings. His slowness is quality, but the system reads it as deficiency. This must be seeded here or in Ch 7 so his firing in Ch 17 feels structurally inevitable, not arbitrary

state_shift: Relational — Nick's bond with Bao becomes a genuine complication, not an abstract one
